1
Step 1
Learn the product

Get familiar with the product and what we need from you before anything else.

Travel data, minus the drama.

Simify offers travel eSIMs — digital SIM cards that give you mobile data when travelling overseas. No SIM swaps. No store queues. No roaming bill shock. Buy before you fly, activate on arrival, tweak a couple of phone settings and you’re online within minutes.

Product highlights
⚡
Unlimited data plans
Unlimited data plans available — stay connected all trip without worrying about running out.
🪄
Effortless setup
No physical SIM to remove or lose. Install via QR code before you fly — when you land, tweak a couple of phone settings and you’re online in minutes.
🗺️
Global eSIM plan
One eSIM that covers 100+ destinations — swap countries without swapping SIMs.
💸
No bill shock
Flat prepaid pricing. No surprise roaming charges. You know exactly what you’re paying.
🌏
150+ destinations
Available across 150+ destinations worldwide — find the right plan for your trip in the app.
📲
Free Simify app
Download the app, pick your plan, and scan the QR code. That’s the whole setup.
📋

⚠️
Content Disclaimers
A few things worth knowing before you film so your content is accurate and on-brand.
▼
⚡ Install vs. Activate ▾
Install = adding the eSIM to your device before you travel (via QR code or the app). Do this at home on Wi-Fi.
Activate = the eSIM switches on automatically when you land and connects to a local network. Customers just need to make sure it’s enabled in their phone settings.
Don’t say the eSIM “activates instantly” or “auto-activates” — viewers need to manually enable it in their device settings on arrival.
✈️ Activating when you land ▾
Don’t say users will be “instantly connected the moment they land.”
The correct phrasing is: “Download the Simify app, choose your plan, and scan the QR code. When you land, update your phone settings and you will be online in minutes.”
💬 Text & call claims ▾
Simify eSIMs are data only — no traditional calls or SMS. Remove any claims about calling or texting.
If messaging is mentioned, clarify it’s via data apps: e.g. “I was able to message my family using WhatsApp.”
📦 Installation claims ▾
Don’t say “one-step installation” — this is currently iPhone only, not Android. Use “easy installation” instead.
📱 App claims ▾
Don’t mention top-ups — we don’t offer them. Instead say: “install, track, and repurchase additional eSIMs.”
🌍 Coverage claims ▾
When referencing the global plan, use: “Simify’s global eSIM plan covers 100+ countries.”
Don’t use blanket “worldwide” claims — Simify does not cover every country.
📶 Unlimited data plan — data speed claims ▾
Avoid phrases like “use as much data as you want” or “unlimited full-speed data.” Instead, keep it benefit-led: “Stay connected all trip without worrying about running out.”
📲
eSIM Installation & Activation Instructions
A lot of viewers will be hearing about eSIMs for the first time — walk them through the setup on camera.
▼
  1. 📶

    1. Connect to Wi-Fi & check compatibility

    Make sure your phone is eSIM-compatible and carrier-unlocked, and that you’re on Wi-Fi before you start. Check: iPhone models · Android models

  2. 📱

    2. Download the Simify app

    Download free on App Store or Google Play →

  3. 🌏

    3. Choose your destination & plan

    Browse 150+ destinations, pick your data plan, and check out in seconds.

  4. ⚡

    4. Install your eSIM

    🍎 iPhone: One-tap install directly in the app
    🤖 Android: Scan the QR code provided after checkout

  5. 🏷️

    5. Rename your eSIM

    In your phone settings, rename the new eSIM to ‘Simify’ so it’s easy to find when you activate on arrival.

  6. 🛬

    6. When you land — activate

    🍎 iPhone: Settings → Mobile Data → select Simify eSIM → turn on Data Roaming

    🤖 Android: Settings → Connections → SIM Manager → select Simify → enable Data Roaming

    When you land, just update your phone settings and you’ll be online within minutes.

    Still not connected? Try restarting your phone.

💡 Good to know:
• Buy now, activate anytime within 6 months
• Data only — calls and messages go through WhatsApp or FaceTime
2
Step 2
Share your content idea

Send us a brief idea for review. You’ll then receive your unique discount code and CTA link. We’ll email you a free $140 AUD eSIM voucher. Download the free Simify app and use your voucher to purchase your eSIM. See eSIM installation & activation instructions ↑

Pick a format
Not sure how to weave Simify in naturally? Here are three formats to get you started. Tap each to expand.
📱
Real-time setup Recommended
Show the install and your first moments online — as they happen
▼
Film yourself installing the eSIM before your flight, then capture the moment you land and go online. Great if your audience has never heard of eSIMs — it walks them through exactly how it works in real life. Just make sure the footage is genuinely from your trip, not filmed at home. “Before this trip, I finally sorted the one thing every traveller needs — a travel eSIM. I’ve been using Simify and it’s made staying connected super easy.”
📋
Travel tips Recommended
Drop Simify into a list of genuine travel tips
▼
Frame the segment as “things I always sort before I fly” or “my honest pre-trip checklist.” Simify is one tip among a few — so the whole thing feels like useful content, not an ad. Viewers are way less likely to skip when they think they’re getting value. “…and sorting data before I fly. I used to just deal with it at the airport which is such a nightmare — now I grab a Simify eSIM before I leave and it’s genuinely one less thing to stress about.”
🌏
Destination plan Recommended
Build the integration around the specific plan you chose for this trip
▼
Instead of talking about Simify generally, make it specific to where you’re going. Tell your audience exactly which plan you picked and why — it feels personal, not promotional, and helps viewers find the right plan for their own trip. “Heading to Bali so I grabbed the South East Asia eSIM on Simify. Took a few minutes to set up, and I didn’t think about data once the whole trip.”
Key rule: Film on location — airport, arrival hall, destination street. Not at home. The integration should feel like part of your trip.

3
Step 3
Submit your draft script

Share the integration script for approval.

Scripting
Simify is a playful brand and we’re looking for integrations that feel genuine and show off your personality. Here are three tones that work well.
🎭
Fun skit
Lean into humour. Act out the “nightmare scenario” of airport SIM queues or roaming bill shock, then solve it with Simify. Keeps viewers engaged and makes the product memorable.
💡
Travel hack
Position Simify as the smart move — a travel hack your audience hasn’t heard of yet. Works well if your content is tips-focused or you’ve got a practical, no-nonsense style.
📖
Storytelling
Bring your audience into a real travel moment — the panic of landing in a new city with no data, scrambling for Wi-Fi, or missing something because you weren’t connected — then show how having a Simify eSIM would have made all the difference.
Hook suggestions
  • The one thing every traveller should sort before they fly
  • Stop paying for roaming — do this instead
  • I never worry about data abroad anymore — here’s why
  • This saved me at the airport (no more SIM card queues)
  • The easiest travel hack I wish I’d known sooner
Video structure

Weave Simify naturally into your travel content rather than dropping it in as a standalone ad. The more it feels like part of your actual experience, the more it resonates with viewers.

It works best when viewers see a real moment — installing the eSIM before your trip, activating it on arrival, or pulling it up when you need data in a new country. Keep it educational too: many people still don’t know what an eSIM is. Help your audience understand why you use one and why Simify works for you.

Below is an example structure to keep you on track. Use it as a loose reference — we’re excited to see your creativity and personality come through. ✈️

0 – 5s

Hook — mention Simify + logo drop

Weave it naturally into a travel moment — something like: “Before this trip, I finally sorted the one thing every traveller needs — a travel eSIM. I’ve been using Simify and it’s made staying connected super easy.”

5 – 15s

Explain what an eSIM is

“An eSIM is a digital SIM card that you download onto your phone using a QR code, which means no physical card, no SIM swapping, or lining up in store queues.”

15 – 25s

The pain — relate to the problem

SIM card queues, roaming shock, hunting for WiFi. Keep it real and brief.

25 – 40s

Demo — show the real setup + mention your plan

Screen recording: open app → choose your plan (e.g. “I’m using the Unlimited South East Asia plan”) → scan the QR code in the app to install your eSIM.

To activate upon arrival → Set as primary, disable auto-switch, enable Data Roaming — you’re online within minutes.

“To install your eSIM, download the Simify app, choose your plan, and scan the QR code. When you land, update your phone settings and you will be online in minutes.”

40 – 52s

Why it works — your honest take

1–2 things you actually like: the price, no hidden fees, works in 150+ countries, unlimited options. Don’t list everything.

52 – 60s

CTA + second logo drop

Display your code on screen and close with the Simify logo to reinforce brand recall.

💬 CTA Script Example
“If you’ve got a trip coming up, grab your Simify eSIM before you fly. You can buy it now and activate it anytime within the next 6 months — and use my code [CODE] for 15% off. Link in the description.”
4
Step 4
Submit draft video

Send us the draft video for review before publishing.

Simify Creator Checklist
Run through this before you hit record — and again before you submit.
Before filming
  • Read the content disclaimers before filming (especially eSIM claims, coverage, and data limits)
  • Film on location at your destination (airports, streets, arrivals — not at home or a desk)
In the video
  • Do not open with “this video is sponsored by Simify” — try saying thanks at the end of the segment instead
  • Introduce Simify within 5–12 seconds (show logo)
  • Open face-to-camera or with strong travel b-roll
  • Include travel b-roll throughout — no generic stock footage
  • Show yourself using Simify on your phone (not just a screen recording)
  • Use this wording: “Download the Simify app, choose your plan, and scan the QR code. When you land, update your phone settings and you’ll be online within minutes.”
  • Avoid saying “instantly connected the moment you land” — say “When you land, tweak a few phone settings and you’ll be online within minutes”
  • Keep the tone conversational — avoid sounding like an ad-read
  • Display your discount code on-screen and verbalise it
  • End with a second Simify logo drop
  • Check audio quality is consistent throughout — no noticeable change mid-segment
Before publishing
  • Put your discount code and CTA link in the first line of the description — don’t bury it

Step 5
Go live + submit invoice

Publish and include your discount code in the description. Once your content is approved and live, we’ll send you the invoice link to submit your payment details. Payment is processed within 30 days of submission.
